targets.rawSql: SELECT LEFT(m.prompt_text, 100) AS prompt, t.model, t.input_tokens, t.output_tokens, t.cache_read_tokens, t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens AS total_tokens, m.timestamp FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY total_tokens DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT s.session_id, s.project, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens) AS total_tokens, COUNT(m.message_uuid) AS messages, s.started_at FROM sessions s JOIN messages m ON m.session_id = s.session_id JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE s.started_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND s.is_subagent = false GROUP BY s.session_id, s.project, s.started_at ORDER BY total_tokens DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT m.tool_name, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens) AS tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND m.tool_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m.tool_name ORDER BY tokens DESC

SELECT m.prompt_type, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens) AS tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY m.prompt_type
